entity.name: Sundeep Govarthinam
entity.description: Independent software engineer based in Bengaluru, India. Active Kite Connect developer for 2+ years, maintaining the Kite MCP Server — an MIT-licensed MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that extends Zerodha's upstream read-only MCP with order placement, alerts, paper trading, options analytics, backtesting, and safety controls. Indian Pvt Ltd incorporation pending.

projects.name: Kite MCP Server
projects.description: Open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for Zerodha Kite Connect. Extends Zerodha's official read-only MCP with ~80 tools covering order placement, price alerts, Telegram briefings, paper trading, options Greeks (Black-Scholes), backtesting (4 strategies), technical indicators, portfolio rebalancing, sector exposure, tax-harvest analysis, and a riskguard safety layer (kill switch, order caps, rate limits). Per-user OAuth with AES-256-GCM encrypted credential storage. Ships MCP widgets for Claude.ai / Claude Desktop, a 24/7 Telegram trading bot, and a full audit trail. Production deployment on Fly.io. 330+ tests, Go 1.25, MIT licensed.

channels.description: Direct grant disbursement via email coordination. Bank transfer / UPI / international wire details will be shared on grant approval. GitHub Sponsors setup pending post-incorporation.

plans.name: Small grant — essentials ($10k tier)
plans.description: Covers Indian Pvt Ltd incorporation + FY1 ROC compliance (~₹85,000), Class 36 + 42 trademark registration (~₹40,000), and one round of independent CERT-In-empanelled VAPT security audit (~₹2,40,000). Unlocks the legal and security baseline required to offer the service commercially and apply for NSE/BSE empanelment. Total ~₹8,40,000 ≈ $10,000.

plans.name: Substantive grant — 6-month focused runway ($35k tier)
plans.description: Small-grant scope PLUS independent security review (~₹4,00,000), 6 months of full-time maintainer runway, BYO-API-key hedge, multi-broker adapter (Dhan port), concall + FII/DII + peer-compare analytics shipped to v1. Enables sustained focused development instead of weekend hacking. Total ~₹29,00,000 ≈ $35,000.

plans.name: Extended grant — 12-month focused runway ($60k tier)
plans.description: Substantive-grant scope PLUS extended maintainer runway through 12 months, second VAPT round, NSE empanelment application + filing fees, OpenTelemetry observability migration, user-support staff hours, and reserve fund for unforeseen compliance work. Keeps the project healthy for the broader Kite developer ecosystem through year 1. Total ~₹56,00,000 ≈ $60,000.
